title: MAW CLI Adapter Config
description: Config-driven CLI adapter for a tmux-hosted coding agent. Source of truth for validation is adapter.config.schema.ts (Zod); this file exists only for editor autocomplete on *.jsonc.

scrollbackMode.description: Reconnect snapshot mode. 'visible' captures only what's on screen (right for TUI CLIs like Claude Code, Codex, Gemini). 'history' captures ~500 lines of tmux scrollback through the repeating-tail dedup (right for line-based CLIs like shell). Defaults to 'visible'.

createWorktree.description: Whether spawning this adapter creates a dedicated git worktree under <worktreeRoot>/<agentId>. Defaults to true. Set false to run directly in the repo root on whatever branch is already checked out (e.g. shell smoke adapter).

historySource.description: Optional structured CLI transcript reader for the reconnect history snapshot. 'claude-jsonl' reads ~/.claude/projects/<encoded-cwd>/<cli_session_id>.jsonl.

forceRedrawOnReconnect.description: When true, the hub nudges pane width by one cell and back after shipping the reconnect snapshot so the CLI sees a SIGWINCH and fully repaints. Defaults to false; enable for TUI CLIs (Claude Code) that otherwise leave the viewer looking at a frozen frame.

mobileQuickKeys.description: On-screen key-chord buttons rendered under xterm on touch devices. Phone soft keyboards don't expose arrow keys, Esc, Shift+Tab or Ctrl+C — declare the ones this CLI needs here. Empty by default.

id.description: Stable id, unique within this adapter. Lowercase kebab.

label.description: Short on-button text. Unicode glyphs allowed (e.g. "↑", "⇧⇥").

keys.description: Raw UTF-8 bytes sent via send_keys. Use JSON escapes for control bytes (e.g. "\u001b[A" for cursor up, "\u0003" for Ctrl+C).

optionalArgs.description: CLI flags the user can toggle on/off per-spawn. Merged at spawn time based on user settings.

id.description: Stable key used in user settings.

description.description: Longer explanation shown below the toggle.

default.description: Default value when the user has no saved preference.
